title: NotificationResponse
description: Represents a notification channel configuration for the OpenZeppelin Relayer, supporting Slack, Discord, Email, Telegram, Webhooks, and custom scripts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the notification channel

name.description: Human-readable name for the notification channel

notification_type.description: The type of notification delivery mechanism

config.description: Type-specific configuration for the notification channel (webhook URL, email address, etc.)

created_at.description: Timestamp when the notification channel was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the notification channel was last updated
